## Description

Describe your changes in detail here. What problem does this solve and what is the technical approach?

---

## Related Issue

Link any related GitHub issues here: e.g. Fixes #123

---

## Type of Change

Please check the options that are relevant:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

---

## Checklist

Please verify that your change meets all contributing criteria:

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have run `make format` to clean up code formatting.
- [ ] I have run `make typecheck` to verify strict typing rules.
- [ ] I have run `make test` and confirmed all unit tests pass successfully.
- [ ] I have added appropriate unit tests in `tests/` covering my changes.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly if necessary.
- [ ] I have checked that I am not committing any credentials or real API keys.
